chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Revision Application D-35 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 03-09-2025. Mr. Hubdar Ali Bhutto, advocate for respondents. Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy P.G for the State. ******** Notices issued to the applicant returned un-served with the endorsement that he is not available at his resident place as he is required as accused in another crime; therefore, the instant Crl. Revision Application stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Nasim/P.A
